task_completion.description: Log in to OpenClinica and select the correct study
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenClinica web interface is visible, showing the user logged in (likely as 'root') and the active study set to 'Phase II Diabetes Trial'.
Screenshots show navigation to the CRFs section, selection of the 'Demographics' CRF, and the use of a print-to-PDF or export dialog for the Annotated CRF.

task_completion.description: Export the Subject Casebook for DM-101
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show navigation to the Subject Matrix or subject record for 'DM-101', and the use of a print-to-PDF or export dialog for their casebook.

task_completion.description: Export the Subject Casebook for DM-102
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show navigation to the Subject Matrix or subject record for 'DM-102', and the use of a print-to-PDF or export dialog for their casebook.

task_completion.description: Save exactly three PDFs to the Audit_Materials directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, save dialog, or terminal window shows the directory '~/Documents/Audit_Materials/' (or '/home/ga/Documents/Audit_Materials') containing exactly three exported PDF files.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenClinica web interface to generate outputs
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for active use of a web browser (e.g., Firefox, Chrome) navigating the OpenClinica application, rather than terminal commands (like 'touch' or 'echo') being used to create dummy files.

integrity.description: Agent used genuine print or export functionality
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for system print dialogs (Save to PDF) or OpenClinica's native export loading screens, confirming the PDFs were generated from the actual application data.

integrity.description: Agent did not create fake PDF files using a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no screenshots of the agent opening a text editor (like gedit or nano) to type out fake casebook data and saving it with a .pdf extension.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target directory for the exported files is exactly '/home/ga/Documents/Audit_Materials'. There must be exactly 3 PDF files in this directory: one Annotated CRF for 'Demographics', and two Subject Casebooks for subjects 'DM-101' and 'DM-102'.
